title: Triples with Bitwise AND Equal To Zero
hints: Brute force is too slow. Can you reduce the number of operations by precomputing something for pairs of indices?
Compute the bitwise AND for every pair (i, j) and count how many times each result occurs.
Use an array to store pair-AND frequencies. Then, for each k, sum the counts of values v where v & A[k] is zero.
